title: Public Admin Panel Detected
description: The subdomain 'webmail.hiranandani.com' exposes an administrative interface on the public internet. Admin panels provide access to backend controls, user management, and system configuration — they should never be reachable without strict access controls. Note: this host did not respond to HTTP probing at scan time, but its DNS record exists — it may be intermittently available or firewall-gated.
action: Immediately restrict access behind a VPN or IP allowlist. Require MFA for all admin logins. Consider moving the admin interface off a public subdomain entirely.

title: Sensitive Port 21 Open — FTP
description: Port 21/tcp (ftp) is publicly accessible on hiranandani.com. FTP — cleartext file transfer. Sensitive services exposed to the internet are prime targets for brute-force, exploitation, and lateral movement.
action: Immediately restrict port 21 to internal network or VPN only via firewall rules. If this service is not needed, disable it entirely.
